CustomField.description: CSN that is communicated by airline for the month. This can be used to reconcile the CSN within LeaseWorks by comparing with current CSN at the beginning of the month + FC during the month
CustomField.inlineHelpText: CSN that is communicated by airline for the month. This can be used to reconcile the CSN within LeaseWorks by comparing with current CSN at the beginning of the month + FC during the month
CustomField.label: Engine4 CSN (As Per Airline)
